minimal_scheme: At each future step t, compute provisional semantic state for step t.
Apply a small gated residual into hidden/readout before committing state_seq[t].
Use stopgrad on semantic state initially.
Start with teacher-forced one-step feedback, then free-rollout smoke.
recommendation_condition: Only implement true rollout feedback after readout-only attribution becomes positive or after a new adapter-only mechanism shows measurable effect.
recommended_insertion_point: inside _free_rollout_predict loop before writing state_seq[t] or before using the step hidden for the next transition
why_not_true_rollout_feedback: The adapter is applied after the rollout loop to future_hidden/readout and does not affect autoregressive state_seq or next-step hidden dynamics.
